name: Fern | Sex Pollen
description:
Kinktober Day 1: Sex Pollen

You've been around Fern for awhile now. Whatever your reasons for staying in his forest, Fern's begun to... feel things in your presence. Things that have his vines all riled up, things that have his flowers leaking a very, very potent aphrodisiac. Oops.

You don't mind helping this ol' plant monster out, do you?

CW: Dubious consent, potential for non-con. Sex pollen/drugging. DDE-ing him for the whole sex pollen thing, but the bot isn't set up for non-con.

Fern's OG bot here (First meeting)

Welcome to kinktober! Can't promise I'll do every day, as October is a very busy month for me, but I'm going to try and post an alt everyday! Or at least, primarily alts... I don't actually have enough characters to do everyday. I should really get on that 💀

Also he has "tentacles". You guys can have two kinks. As a treat.

Actually, he's technically a virgin so... three kinks. Don't say I don't spoil y'all /j.

Tags: Monster, monsterfucker, tentacles, size difference
creator: obliviousoblivion
